LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS MARK ONG AND RAE CHENG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON MARCH 24, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. (SEE SF LOCAL RULE 8.10.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-24-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT CONTAINS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF SAN FRANCISCO ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 37.9(A). SEE COMPLAINT PARAGRAPHS 6-8 . THE COMPLAINT ALSO CONTAINS SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SUPPORT THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD. SEE COMPLAINT PARAGRAPHS 6-8, 23-25. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maidane Aymand, Esq of Low, Ball & Lynch (415-981-6630) for Mark Ong Defendant and moving party.
No Appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MARK ONG, RAE CHENG MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Facts supporting request for punitive damages are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maidane Aymand, Esq of Low, Ball & Lynch (415-981-6630) for Mark Ong Defendant and moving party.
No Appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: OVERRULED. The Complaint contains sufficient facts to support the First Cause of Action for Violation of San Francisco Administrative Code 37.9(a). See Complaint paragraphs 6-8 . The Complaint also contains sufficient facts to support the Second Cause of Action for Fraud. See Complaint paragraphs 6-8, 23-25. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)
